name: Beaver Brook Country Club
description: Beaver Brook Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Clinton Township, NJ. There are 5 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Bundt Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bundt Park in Allerton, NJ! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Courtside Racquet Club
description: Come play pickleball at Courtside Racquet Club in Lebanon, NJ! There are 9 hard courts. 6 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Flemington Pickleball Club
description: Flemington Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Flemington, NJ. There are 5 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: Riegle Ridge Community Center
description: Riegle Ridge Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Milford, NJ. There are 4 asphalt and wood courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include locker rooms and restrooms.

name: Summer Road Park
description: Summer Road Park is a place to play pickleball in Flemington, NJ. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.
